query: Find spend anomalies by comparing current month spend to 3-month average, then classify anomalies as normal_variance, concerning, or critical.

step_1_sql.query: WITH monthly_spend AS (SELECT publisher, DATE_TRUNC('month', event_date) AS month, SUM(amount_usd) AS monthly_total FROM consumption_facts GROUP BY publisher, DATE_TRUNC('month', event_date)) SELECT publisher, monthly_total, ROUND(AVG(monthly_total) OVER (PARTITION BY publisher ORDER BY month ROWS BETWEEN 3 PRECEDING AND 1 PRECEDING), 2) AS three_month_avg FROM monthly_spend WHERE month = DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE)

step_2_consumer.task: Classify spend as normal if within ±10% of avg, concerning if ±10-30%, critical if >30% variance
